//===== rAthena Script =======================================
//= Equipment Archive: Below Lv 100 Hidden Shops
//===== Description: =========================================

//= of known regional, placeholder, event/free and test variants.
//= Prices are raised only when needed to prevent NPC buy/sell
//= arbitrage with Discount Lv.10 and Overcharge Lv.10.
//============================================================
